docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CORONA, ERICA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALVO, CARLOS A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS ZERO SERVED APR-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALVO, CARLOS A

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERICA CORONA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS A. MONTALVO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CORONA, ERICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORONA, ERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTALVO, CARLOS A $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORONA, ERICA AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALVO, CARLOS A
